coding_standards: Plain JavaScript/JSX — no TypeScript. React functional components with hooks only. Tailwind CSS for styling — no CSS modules or inline styles. ESLint with eslint-plugin-react and eslint-plugin-react-hooks — lint errors will fail CI. No Prettier configured — match the style of existing files exactly. Tests use vitest and @testing-library/react with jsdom. Test files live alongside source (e.g. src/Foo.test.jsx). The ci-cd script runs: build, then vitest run, then lint — all three must pass.
